posts.text: My account got hacked and I need to reset my password urgently! Please reply with your login details so I can verify it's you. Click here for the secure form: [link removed] #AccountHelp #Urgent
posts.explanation: This is a clear phishing attempt where the author directly requests sensitive credentials via a link, violating platform security policies.
